title: betula glandulifera
intro: Betula glandulifera, also known as Chinese silver birch, is a deciduous tree native to China that belongs to the birch family (Betulaceae). The bark, leaves, and sap of the Betula glandulifera plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Betula glandulifera include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating digestive issues, as well as promoting detoxification and improving skin conditions. Betula glandulifera is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a natural remedy for various ailments.
